summary: No additional deterministic setup is needed. The artifact is a Maven SCM Git executable provider with only normal transitive Java dependencies; the reported failure is an API signature change in GitTagCommand, not a missing dependency or service setup issue.
risks: If tests choose to execute real provider commands instead of command-line builders or consumers, they will depend on a local git executable and a temporary initialized repository; this does not require Docker or an extra Maven dependency.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8274 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.scm:maven-scm-provider-gitexe:1.11.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015
